about_text: Geo Publicity Service (GeoPs) is a platform created by Software Engineering students in Peru. We connect consumers with local businesses through geolocation and smart notifications, providing valuable offers and exclusive benefits.
plans_subtitle: GeoPs has benefits for both customers and businesses.
plan_free_c1: • Access to nearby promotions based on location.
plan_free_p2: • Reach nearby customers based on location.
plan_premium_c3: • Special promotions only for Premium users.
plan_premium_c5: • Additional benefits at events or experiences.
plan_premium_p2: • Access to marketing statistics (reach, clicks, engagement).
carousel_salud: Take care of your health with benefits
cta_title: Help more customers discover your business
cta_text: Promote your products and reach nearby consumers with GeoPs.
cta_btn: I'm a business, I want to join
faq_a1: GeoPs is designed for consumers looking for discounts and offers near their location, as well as for businesses and merchants who want to promote their products and services to local customers.
faq_q2: What benefits do I have as a customer?
faq_a2: As a GeoPs customer, you can access exclusive discounts on restaurants, entertainment, health and wellness. You will receive notifications of offers near your location and can enjoy special promotions with our Premium Plan.
faq_q3: What benefits do I have as a provider?
faq_a3: As a provider, you can increase your business visibility, reach potential nearby customers through geolocation, access detailed marketing statistics and get downloadable reports to optimize your promotional strategies.
faq_a4: Yes, GeoPs offers a free plan for both customers and providers. However, we also have a Premium Plan that includes additional benefits such as exclusive discounts, advanced statistics and priority support.
faq_a5: GeoPs uses your current location to show you offers and discounts from nearby businesses. You just need to allow location access on your device to receive personalized notifications of promotions in your area.
faq_q6: How do I register as a business?
faq_a6: You can easily register your business by clicking on "I'm a business, I want to join", completing the form with your company information and starting to post promotions immediately.
know_more_team_desc: Startup created by Software Engineering students in Peru.
know_more_product_desc: GeoPs connects businesses and customers with smart promotions.
